message:
feat: Add integration test for Q2_K streaming (Phase 2.2)

Created test-streaming command to validate StreamingContext works:

Test (src/test_streaming_q2k.zig):
- Loads Q2_K cached model via StreamingContext
- Validates all layers are resident in heap
- Demonstrates heterogeneous pipeline is ready
- Run: `zig build test-streaming -- models/your-model.gguf`

Build System (build.zig):
- Renamed test-streaming target to use new Q2_K test
- Moved from src/inference/ to src/ for proper imports

StreamingContext Fixes (llama.zig):
- Allocate GGUFLoader on heap (not stack)
- Proper memory management in deinit()

This validates Phase 2.1 + 2.2 integration:
  ✅ StreamingContext loads Q2_K models
  ✅ All layers fit in RAM (10GB for 32B model)
  ✅ Ready for CPU+GPU heterogeneous inference

Next: Phase 2.3 - Implement tokenizer/sampler/generation
